items.title: 【ホロライブ】ときのそら、9周年記念イベント「9th Anniversary Party」をぴあアリーナMMで開催決定！「夢は、ひとつ先のステージへ」
items.author: ホロミ
items.content:
VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の「ときのそら」さんが、自身のX（旧Twitter）および公式情報を更新し、活動9周年を記念するイベント『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』の開催を特報として発表しました。

開催日は2026年11月7日（土）、会場は数多くのアーティストが伝説を残してきた「ぴあアリーナMM」です。

特報を受け、ファン（そらとも）の間では早くも期待の声が高まっています。横浜の地に響き渡る歌声と、記念すべきパーティーがどのようなものになるのか、11月の開催に向けて注目が集まります。

『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』は、2026年11月7日（土）にぴあアリーナMMにて開催予定です。

items.title: 常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんのサイン入り色紙が当たる！『灰仭巫覡』新PV＆オリジナルソング公開記念キャンペーン開催
items.author: ホロミ
items.content:
大暮維人先生が描く人気漫画『灰仭巫覡（カイジンフゲキ）』のオリジナルソングと新PVの公開を記念し、2025年9月5日より豪華プレゼントキャンペーンがスタートしました。

新PV公開！常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんが歌うオリジナルソング

2025年9月3日、講談社の「マガジンチャンネル」にて『灰仭巫覡』の新たなプロモーションビデオが公開されました。

このPVのために書き下ろされたオリジナルソング『君と明かした夜』は、ホロライブ所属の人気VTuberである常闇トワさんと獅白ぼたんさんが歌唱を担当。

今回の発表を記念して、抽選で1名様にが当たるキャンペーンが開催されます。

  1. 『灰仭巫覡』公式X（旧Twitter）アカウント（@KAIJINFUGEKI_WM）をフォロー
  2. ※「#灰仭巫覡PV公開」「#カイジンフゲキ」のハッシュタグが付いたポストが目印です。

2025年9月5日（金）0:00 〜 2025年9月14日（日）23:59まで

利用規約に同意し、日本国内にお住まいで郵便物・宅配物の受け取りが可能な方。

注意事項：色紙には当選者の宛名が記載されます。当選者にはXのダイレクトメッセージにて連絡があります。

『灰仭巫覡』コミックス第1巻から第5巻まで好評発売中です。

items.title: 【速報】戌神ころね、ホンダのeスポーツ大会アンバサダーに2年連続で就任！→本人も「よろしくお願いします」と意気込み「世界の戌神」「今年もきた！」
items.author: ホロミ
items.content:
人気VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」所属の戌神ころねさんが、本田技研工業（Honda）が主催するeモータースポーツのグローバル大会「Honda Racing eMS 2025」の公式アンバサダーに、昨年に引き続き就任したことが発表されました。

このニュースに、ファンからは「2年連続はすごすぎる！」「今年も応援します！」といった声が相次いでいます。

「Honda Racing eMS」は、世界3地区（アジア・オセアニア、米州、欧州・中東・アフリカ）のトップドライバーたちが地域最速の座をかけて競い合う、本格的なeモータースポーツのグローバル大会です。

戌神さんは「Honda Racing eMS 2024」でもアンバサダーを務めており、今回で2年連続という大役を担うことになります。

ゲーム実況で人気を誇る戌神ころねと、世界のHondaとのコラボが再び実現しました。

2025年8月26日、Honda Racing eMSの公式X（旧Twitter）アカウントが「━ Honda Racing eMS 2025 開催 ━ 昨年に続き『戌神ころね』が公式アンバサダーに！」とポストし、戌神さんのアンバサダー就任を正式に発表。

あわせて、されるという大会スケジュールも公開しました。

この公式発表に対し、戌神さん本人も自身のXアカウントで「今年もアンバサダーを務めさせていただきます！よろしくお願いします」と引用ポストし、就任への意気込みを表明しました。

この就任のニュースに、ファンからは「世界のHondaに認められた女、戌神ころね」「ころさんの影響力すごい！」「これを機にレースゲームに挑戦してみようかな」など、驚きと喜びのコメントがありました。

items.title: Ver. 1.4.0.0: New Area, Simulation Room Updates Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

Holoearth will be updated to Ver. 1.4.0.0 on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 after maintenance.

(Schedule is subject to change.)

New Area: Walled City of Vesta

About The Walled City of Vesta A city centered around a massive circular ruin, with walls that protect it from outside threats.

It boasts strong military power with knight orders and an adventurers guild, with a flourishing culture including cuisine and the arts.

The new area, Walled City of Vesta, is a cultural city with a majestic atmosphere. It also appears in the animation promotional video titled “Now, Discover Your Other World,” so you can recreate scenes from the video and take photos.

Commemorative Area Release Gifts

To commemorate the opening of Vesta, we will be giving away items.

After maintenance ends they will be delivered to the Gift Box in the HoloPhone (H key).

・Cafe Drink

Simulation Room Improvements & Over 90 New Furniture Items!

The Simulation Room will receive a major update with various quality-of-life improvements. In addition to balance adjustments, new re-playable elements and additional furniture sets such as “holo no graffiti” will be introduced. Please enjoy the new adventures and crafting.

Balance Adjustments & New Items

The following balance adjustments will be made:

・Removing loss of items and observation data when incapacitated ・Increased walk and sprint movement speed

・Increased initial carrying capacity from 100 to 300

・Increased acquisition amount for certain materials

・Increased initial stamina from 50 to 75

・More rare variant spawns for some monsters ・More holo Incentives for daily quest rewards

Spawned bosses will be added.

・Huge Toxic Slime ・Horned Bull

Defeating all three bosses, including the current Golem boss, will drop materials that can be used to craft the new Jabberwock Statue item.

Create the related C2 Spawner items via Projection at a ProtectCube and use the item to spawn its boss.

Crafted Items Available in Other Areas

The following equipment, when crafted, will be available for use outside of the Simulation Room

・Explorer’s Beret (Blu / Red / Gn) ・Explorer’s Tunic (Blu / Red / Gn)

・Explorer’s Boots (Bn / Gry / Blk)

・Golem Helm ・Golem Greaves

Over 90 New Furniture Items!

What is “holo no graffiti” “hologra” is a weekly short animation featuring talents of the VTuber group hololive production.

These items can also be used in My Room and My Shop.

It will be possible to craft these items starting from ProtectCube Lv. 2 via Projection.

・Office Foundation ・Office Wall ・Office Doorframe ・Office Entrance Doorframe ・Office Floor/Ceiling ・Office Horizontal Shelf ・Office Cabinet ・Office Desk Space ・Office Kitchen ・Office Light ・Office Low Table ・Office Partition ・Office Sofa (Gn) ・Office TV

・Office Mounted Whiteboard

・Office Whiteboard ・Office Model Ship

・Office Tapioca Picture Frame

・Office Moai Statue ・Office Tissue Box ・Office Paper Bag ・Office Fire Extinguisher ・Office Watermelon ・Office Aluminum Can ・Office Megaphone ・Office Dictionary ・Office Cyber Driving School Sign ・Office Insecticide

・White Wall ・White Floor/Ceiling ・White Doorframe

・White Wood-Grain Floor/Ceiling

・White Wood-Grain Foundation ・Simple Curtains (Wh)

・Simple Rolling Cabinet (Wh)

・Simple Headphones (Wh)

・Simple Air Conditioner (Wh)

・Simple Mounted Headphones ・Wooden Acoustic Panel ・Room Fragrance ・STREAMER GIRLY Fridge

・STREAMER GIRLY Gaming Chair

・STREAMER GIRLY PC Tower

・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Keyboard

・STREAMER GIRLY Mic ・STREAMER GIRLY Digital Clock

・STREAMER GIRLY Star Light

・STREAMER GIRLY Honeycomb Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Trash Can ・STREAMER GIRLY Neon Sign

・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Rack

・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Mat Set

・STREAMER GIRLY Audio Interface

・STREAMER GIRLY Mini Monitor

・STREAMER GIRLY Macro Pad

・STREAMER GIRLY Monitor & Cam ・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Set ・STREAMER GIRLY Room Light

・STREAMER GIRLY Cactus Light

・STREAMER GIRLY Moon Light

・STREAMER GIRLY Tabletop Frame

・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Frame

・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Shelf

・Jabberwock Statue

・C2 Spawner (Horned Bull)

Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach Reopen

Due to popular demand, the Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach areas will reopen. Kyo-no-Miyako has been changed to later in the day for enjoying the cherry blossoms at night, offering a different atmosphere from before, and Celestial Beach has had part of its layout changed.

Commemorative Items & Gestures for Area Re-Openings

Also, to celebrate the reopening of Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach, we will be giving away items and a gesture. After maintenance ends, gift items will be delivered to the Gift Box in the HoloPhone menu (H key).

Enjoy using the “Kanpai” and “Water Gun” gestures together!

・Holoearth Original Drink ・Gesture (Omairi)

Note: the “Omairi” gesture is the same as the one previously released.

FLOW GLOW Chat Stickers & Sticker T-Shirts

New chat stickers will be available at the hololive production official shop in HOLOEARTH.

・FLOW GLOW Sticker Pack vol. 1 ・Sticker T Isaki Riona (Blk / Wh

items.title: hololive English -Advent- x Mahjong Pros “hololive English -Advent- Mahjong Collection” Now Available for Pre-Order!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
March 19, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce a collaboration between Mahjong Pros, a leading company specializing in mahjong books and sets, and hololive English -Advent-, introducing the hololive English -Advent- Mahjong Collection.

Created in collaboration with Mahjong Pros, the hololive English -Advent- Mahjong Collection is fully themed around hololive English -Advent- and features custom artwork by FUWAMOCO’s original artist, Icomochi. In addition, hololive English -Advent- designs are integrated throughout the entire mahjong set and collection.

Designed for both collectors and players, this release features a globally compatible mahjong set built to support a wide range of mahjong styles, bringing more players together at the table. Custom artwork and themed components celebrate the world of hololive English -Advent-.

Fans can find the exclusive merchandise featuring talents in Qipao-inspired outfits with mahjong themes on the Mahjong Pros website. The first round of pre-orders opens on March 18, 2026, at 12:00 PM (UTC-6). As a bonus, fans who purchase any product or bundle with a Mahjong Tile Set will receive a limited-edition hololive English -Advent- themed Mahjong Compass.

Mahjong Set: 399.99 USD Acrylic Keychain: 8.00 USD

Mahjong Compass: 40.00 USD

Mahjong Mat: 80.00 USD

Mahjong Pros is an independent publisher and design studio dedicated to bringing mahjong to a global audience. Through books, games, and licensed collaborations with artists and entertainment brands, Mahjong Pros develops products that celebrate the strategy, history, and culture of mahjong while making the game more accessible to new players around the world.

items.title: hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- Screening to Premiere in the UK at London’s Genesis Cinema on 2 May 2026
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
March 18, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce the first official concert delay view screening of the third hololive English concert “hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-” in the UK. Produced by Virtual Stage Productions, this event marks the first time a hololive concert is officially screened in the United Kingdom, giving an opportunity for fans to see the live production at London’s Genesis Cinema on 2 May 2026.

Fans can purchase tickets to the event as of March 18 at 9:00 (GMT). Both Day 1 and Day 2 of the original event will be available to attend, with a runtime of 150 minutes each. Day 1 of the event will take place from 17:00 to 19:30, and Day 2 will take place from 20:00 to 22:30.

Originally taking place at the Radio City Music Hall in 2025, the UK version of the concert will present a new experience that retains the integrity of the US show. The screening will feature a complete redesign of the stage to accommodate the new venue alongside brand-new effects and lighting. Fans can expect event-exclusive experiences such as a licensed merchandise booth, talent cut-outs, and a photo wall. Standard admission will be priced at £35. A VIP option at £100 will also be available, allowing attendees to have all-day access to both screenings and selected merchandise.

For further information and updates regarding the event, please visit the official social media accounts below.

About Virtual Stage Productions

Established at the beginning of 2026, Virtual Stage Productions (VSP) is the newly-established technical branch of Vocafest, an organisation dedicated to bringing virtual performances to the physical stage. By combining holographic projection technology, advanced lighting control, live audio engineering, and low-latency streaming infrastructure into one seamless production workflow, Virtual Stage Productions aims to create hybrid digital shows that bring justice to the virtual talent they represent.

items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

The “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” event that was held on March 13 in Holoearth is now available as a 3D archive, featuring Aki Rosenthal from hololive 1st Generation.

During the special segment held after the show, exclusive to Holoearth, two belly dance dance gestures performed by Aki Rosenthal are now being released as a special, limited launch!

These gestures were created in response to a request from Aki Rosenthal during the event and faithfully recreate her energetic belly dance performance.

・Aki Rosenthal’s Belly Dance

・Aki Rosenthal’s Belly Dance Part 2

Catch the Event Again in the 3D Archive!

Experience the event again through the fully-preserved 3D archive! Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.

Note: Those who already purchased the event ID holder can participate again.

Those who do not yet have the event ID holder can participate by purchasing one.

items.title: Pre-Registration for the first Official hololive Mobile Game “hololive Dreams” is Open Globally!
items.author: narita
items.content:
March 11, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Headquarters: Minato-ku, Tokyo; President: Motoaki Tanigo) in collaboration with CyberAgent, Inc. (Headquarters: Shibuya-ku, Tokyo; President: Takahiro Yamauchi; TSE: 4751) and its consolidated subsidiary QualiArts, Inc. (Headquarters: Shibuya-ku, Tokyo; President: Yoshitatsu Tsujioka) have announced pre-registration for the first official hololive mobile game hololive Dreams (or holodori). Pre-registration is open for fans across the globe, excluding certain regions.

Concurrent with the opening of pre-registration, new information regarding the upcoming mobile game was revealed during the hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 event, held across the weekend of March 6-8, 2026.

The Full Scope of holodori Revealed!

hololive Dreams (abbreviated as holodori) is the first official mobile game for the VTuber group hololive, featuring a massive roster of over 50 virtual YouTubers. The full details and the latest trailer were unveiled at hololive SUPER EXPO 2026. Watch the latest game trailer here: https://youtu.be/LQAm-2QHefE

hololive Dreams is an Rhythm Game & RPG set in an amusement park.

Set on a remote island, the player’s objective is to complete various facilities for the hololive members and build the magical “DREAM PARK” for everyone.

Pre-Registration Campaigns: Three Campaigns Now Live

To celebrate the start of pre-registration, the following three campaigns have been launched:

All players will receive in-game items based on the total number of pre-registrations. Upon reaching the final milestone, rewards equivalent to 10 cumulative Gacha pulls will be granted to all users.

Furthermore, if pre-registrations exceed 500,000, specially-designed advertising trucks featuring each of the 54 participating hololive members are scheduled to run in major cities worldwide.

Participants can enter a giveaway for a chance to win premium prizes instantly, including the latest iPad Pro and various digital gift cards.

3. hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME 15-Card Set Giveaway! Hashtag Posting Campaign! By following the official X account and posting with the hashtag #holodori_prereg, 100 winners will be selected to receive a 15-card set from the hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME (hOCG).

For updates and new developments on the mobile game, please visit the official hololive Dreams website and X accounts. Pre-register today and stay tuned for this highly anticipated hololive gaming experience!

Copyright: © COVER / © QualiArts, Inc. Publisher: QualiArts, Inc.

Development/Operations: COVER Corporation / QualiArts, Inc.

Sakura Miko x HYTE Y70 PC Case and Keycap/ Desk Pad Bundle has been announced!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
March 6, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan, CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is proud to be partnering with HYTE, a leading manufacturer of cutting-edge PC components and peripherals, and hololive Gen 0’s Sakura Miko, announcing the Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko Case, and the Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle.

As the latest case made in collaboration with HYTE, the Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko case will use black or white colorways and features custom artwork of Sakura Miko from renowned artist Rosuuri across all three of the Y70’s glass panels. In addition, Sakura Miko’s name and additional designs are integrated into the Y70’s trim, along with a customized and serialized back plate on the case’s back panel.

Also announced today is the Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle. Included in the bundle is a 150-keycap set in Black or White colorways that feature Rosuuri’s Sakura Miko artwork, iconography, and JIS characters printed onto the keycaps, as well as a 900mm x 400mm desk pad that comes with every keycap set.

Pre-orders will open in Q2 2026. To sign up for when pre-orders go live, please visit:http://hyte.co/miko.

For residents outside of the US and Canada, please wait for more information on pricing and availability in local retail stores.

■ Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko Case Pre-Order: Planned for Q2, 2026 Release Date: Q2-Q3 2026

The Official HYTE Y70 Sakura Miko case will come in two versions, one that uses a black colorway, and another that uses a white colorway.

■ Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap and Desk Pad Bundle Pre-Order: Planned for Q2, 2026 Release Date: Q2-Q3 2026

The Official HYTE Sakura Miko Keycap Set will come in two versions, one that uses a black colorway, and another that uses a white colorway. Both sets will include the same Desk Pad across each set.* Desk Pad Design is still under development. For any additional updates, please stay tuned to HYTE’s website and official social media channels.

items.title: hololive x Gundam Collab Teases Exclusive Gunpla Kits as First Wave Unveiled
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Bandai has officially revealed the first wave of an exciting new crossover project blending the worlds of a legendary mecha franchise and a massively popular virtual idol agency.

items.title: 「雪花ラミィ」が『麻雀格闘倶楽部Sp』に登場！「ホロライブ麻雀コラボ 雪花ラミィ&復刻麻雀コラボリレ…
Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 “Monopoly” Encore Photo Contest Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

Support Campaign: “Monopoly” Encore Photo Contest!

Outstanding entries will be featured on the official website, and submitted works may be introduced on the official X accounts during the event period.

1. Hide “NaviRobo” and “Usernames” in the Options menu.

2. Capture in 1920×1080 (Full HD) or 3840×2160 (4K).

3. Post your screenshots on X with the hashtags (no entry limit!): #Holoearth

You will have plenty of chances to capture the perfect shot! By purchasing an ID Holder, you can rejoin the event through the 3D archive during the event period.

・When taking screenshots, we recommend disabling “Motion Blur” in the Options menu (ESC) to prevent blurry photos.

・In the event venue, you can press O to adjust the number of avatars rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks or poppers) off, which reduces system load.

・By using the “Live Camera” feature added in Ver. 1.3.0.0, you can watch the stage with camera work that follows the performance and stage effects.

items.title: Ver. 1.3.0.0 Release Notes
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
This is the Holoearth Management Team. Holoearth was updated on March 5, 2026.

Underworld Geo is now open. Underworld Geo is one of Holoearth’s premier entertainment cities, featuring a theater for enjoying immersive concert performances as well as the Poker Room.

Nanaka was added to Focal Square.

The Five Succubus Sisters were added to Underworld Geo and the Poker Room.

A Live Camera Mode for that can be switched to during concerts was added.

4. Items & Customization Options

The following new avatar fashion items were added.

● Tops ・UG.FROLIC Elegant Dress (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Jacket & Blouse (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Bodysuit

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Jacket

● Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Underwear

・UG.FROLIC Lace Underwear (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・ALTERMODE Piped Underwear

● Bottoms ・UG.FROLIC Balloon Shorts (Wine / YelGn / Grp)

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shorts

● Socks ・UG.FROLIC Bat & Card Tights

・UG.FROLIC Suspender Socks (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

● Shoes ・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Heels

・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Heels (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Shoes (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shoes

● Hats ・UG.FROLIC Veil Hat (Gn / YelGn / Grp)

・UG.FROLIC Wings Accessory

● Eyewear ・UG.FROLIC Diamond Monocle (Bg / Gry / DkGry)

● Earrings ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Earrings

● Gloves ・UG.FROLIC Half-Palm Gloves (Blk / Vlt / DkGry)

● Hair Accessory ・Underworld Geo Horns

● Wrist Accessories ・UG.FROLIC Wrist Cuffs

The following new gesture was added.

■ Avatar Customization Options The following avatar customization options were added.

● Hair (Bangs) ・Over-Eye Asymmetrical Bangs

・Active Asymmetrical Bangs

● Hair (Sides) ・Natural Long Side Bangs

● Hair (Back) ・Half Side Tail

● Contacts ・UG.FROLIC Glamorous Heart

● Face Accents ・Dual Color Feather ・Cross Scar

Improvements & Adjustments

■UI adjustments Change Area, Shop, Change Outfit, and HoloPhone menu icons were added to the top right of the screen.

■New idle motions Relax 3 and Relax 4 were added as new idle motions.

■HoloPhone update In certain areas such as Focal Square users will now be able to activate the HoloPhone while moving.

■Photo Mode update While Photo Mode is active, users an now take pictures using the left mouse button or the Space bar.

■Chat feature update In certain areas such as Focal Square chat messages will now be displayed across the entire area.

■Change Area for Simulation Room An area selection feature has been added to the Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop.

■Avatar customization update Avatars can now be customized without needing Alt Beautys Points or Rebuild Cores.

■ Attacking the “Huge Slime” in the Simulation Room will aggro the “Bumble Bees” located far away.

■ When attempting to use a serial code, a server error occurs and the item cannot be redeemed.

■ If Photo Mode is entered while the username is displayed, the username disappears immediately but reappears after taking a photo once.

■ Taking a photo while operating the camera with the mouse in Photo Mode causes the camera to shift after the photo.

■ When exiting Photo Mode, gestures and motions are canceled.

■ In the Simulation Room, some furniture and monsters turn completely black at night.

■ When a display with built-in speakers is connected, official account voice audio plays through the display speakers regardless of sound settings.

■ The transparency settings for user-made items configured in Creator Tools are not correctly reflected in-app.

■ In the Simulation Room, world quests that have already ended remain on the list and are not marked as completed until the quest issuer logs in.

■ Opening the Gift Box while it contains items causes items in it not to appear in the list the first time it is opened.

■ When using Bluetooth earphones, sound switches from stereo to mono.

■ When displaying the Room List for the second time or later, the refresh button does not become active.

■ Changes to gesture settings in the Simulation Room do not save successfully.

items.title: Celebratory Drawn to Dawn: Official Pre-Party with TakoTori Comes to Los Angeles!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
March 5, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce Drawn to Dawn: Official Pre-Party with TakoTori, the very first official concert pre-party, scheduled for March 22nd, 2026 in Los Angeles, California. This exciting new kind of event will be hosted by hololive production in celebration of both the fans’ continued support as well as talents Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina’nis and their first ever concert in the United States.

To thank concert-goers for joining the talents on this amazing journey, fans with a valid concert venue ticket to attend Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis 1st Concert “Drawn to Dawn” in person will be eligible to register for a random selection process to gain admission to the pre-party. Registration for this random selection process will be free of charge and will not require any other form of consideration.

Lucky fans who are selected from this process will then be invited for a special celebration at no cost. In addition to free on-site giveaways and refreshments, the event will also feature an afternoon of interactive activities with Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina’nis.

Gold Glove Bar at Dodgers Stadium

1000 Vin Scully Ave Los Angeles, CA 90026

Daytime Event (More specific start time to be updated)

Free (By invitation only)

March 4, 2026 18:00 – March 11, 2026 23:59 PST* Successful applicants will be selected at random and informed of results via email on March 16, 2026 23:59 PST.

For additional details about this event and the latest updates, please check the official social media accounts below.

・ Please note that due to limited capacity this event will be invitation only. Interested attendees may apply via the above Registration Form, with successful applicants to be selected via a random selection process. ・ Applicants must hold a valid concert venue ticket for Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis 1st Concert “Drawn to Dawn” via Ticketmaster and be able to physically attend the event at the above date and location.

・ Applicants must be 18 years or older to attend.

Further Terms and Conditions may be found within the Event Registration Form.

items.title: 「hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams」とJOYSOUNDがスペシャ…
Mar 13 “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

On Friday, March 13, 2026, Holoearth will host the event “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth,” featuring hololive 1st Generation member Aki Rosenthal.

Become an avatar and share the same space with Aki Rosenthal for the ultimate immersive experience.

After the initial performance, participate again via a fully-preserved 3D archive. All you need is a PC (Windows)—no VR equipment is required.

To commemorate the event, items inspired by Aki Rosenthal, such as accessories, penlights, and text plates, will be available for purchase. Additionally, as part of supporting the show, a photo contest and other activities are also planned!

Event name: “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Date & time (JST): Friday, March 13, 2026 from 21:00 (Area opens at 18:00)

Contents: “Monopoly” (new song), MC portion (30 minutes in total)

Venue: Holoearth

(This performance is pre-recorded.)

Participating in the Holoearth event requires a Windows PC with Holoearth installed and a registered account, as well as the in-app item “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder.”

Equipping your avatar with the “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder” item will grant access to the in-app venue.

Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Experience the event from different angles, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.

(Holoearth is available only on Windows.) Please see recommended PC specs on the Holoearth Download page.

Note: In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos.

Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder *Cannot be purchased repeatedly.

・Allows entry to the Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth event.

・Allows viewing of the 3D archive.

・Included in the cheer set for the event.

240 HoloCoin (Premium)

(480 JPY equivalent (tax-included))

A special cheer set with items for supporting Aki Rosenthal will also be available for purchase, which includes items such as a mascot hair accessory and penlights.

1,220 HoloCoin (Premium)

(2,440 JPY equivalent (tax-included))

・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore ID Holder *Cannot be purchased repeatedly

・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore *Cannot be purchased repeatedly

・Rose Knights Hair Accessory

・Aki Rosenthal Live Celebration T (Signed)

March 13, 2026 (Fri) from 21:00 (JST)

①8:00〜　 ②10:00〜　③12:00〜　④14:00〜　⑤16:00〜　⑥19:00〜　⑦20:00〜　⑧21:00〜　⑨22:00〜　⑩23:00〜

Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.

This performance is pre-recorded.

Screenshots from the entire performance may be posted on social media.

Videos with audio up to 10-seconds long may be shared on social media.

The 3D archive may be played via the event venue screens for activities such as talent watch parties.

Due to the nature of this content, which allows users to freely control the camera, it is produced in accordance with international safety standards and guidelines regarding visual display (such as flicker frequency and changes in brightness levels).

However, certain user actions may still produce unexpectedly strong visual stimuli. In particular, individuals with a history of photosensitivity (such as photosensitive epilepsy or light-induced sensitivity), those who are sleep-deprived or unwell, and minors should avoid the actions listed below and exercise caution when viewing this content.

Rapid and intense camera movements—such as panning quickly from side to side, tilting up and down, or repeatedly zooming in and out—may cause fast motion across the screen and strong flickering.

[Sudden Approaches to Light Sources] Suddenly moving the camera close to bright lights used in the live performance (such as stage lighting, lasers, fireworks, or effects), or filling the screen with a bright light source, may cause abrupt changes in brightness.

If you experience strong visual stimulation, dizziness, nausea, convulsions, or any vision abnormalities while viewing this content, stop immediately, look away from the screen, and take a break. If symptoms do not improve, promptly seek medical attention.

Please view this content at your own risk with thorough understanding of the above potential hazards. We kindly ask for your understanding and cooperation to ensure safe usage.

Mirrored streaming of this performance is strictly prohibited.

Uploading videos of the paid portion of this performance (after the first song and its MC) to social media or YouTube is prohibited.

Event Venue Preview Area!

Take an early look at the event venue for “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth.” This area will be a free-admission experience zone, so anyone can enter and get a taste of the event atmosphere ahead of time.

Limited-Time Digital Items

・Aki Rosenthal Live Celebration T (No Signature)

・Rose Knights Hair Accessory

・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space.

・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Outfit Acrylic Stand M

・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Outfit Acrylic Stand L

・Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore Key Visual Acrylic Panel

・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Type A

・Penlight Aki Rosenthal Type B

Note:

Penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space.

・Aki Rosenthal Text Plage 1 x3

(AkiRose / Otsuta-ru / Alooona / Kanpai! / Thanks for Waiting!)

・An issue was confirmed where some penlights may appear as pink squares depending on certain conditions.

・If this issue occurs, please try switching to another handheld item and back or unequipping and re-equipping the penlight.

Stage & Pathfinder Outfits Available!

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Bodysuit (upper / lower)

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Underwear

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Tights

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Heels

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Mini Hat

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Gloves

・Aki Rosenthal Ver. Wrist Cuffs

From March 13, 2026 (Fri) 21:00 (JST)

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Pathfinder Jacket Aki Rosenthal

・Pathfinder Sneakers Aki Rosenthal

In the “Underworld Geo” area, an Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth street takeover will also take place.

The event shirt will take shape in the real world. The event T-shirt, designed by Aki Rosenthal in Holoearth, is now available on Amazon!

It is a unique item that connects two different worlds: the virtual and the real.

items.title: Ver. 1.3.0.0 Announcement: New Area, New Characters, Live Camera Feature
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

Holoearth will be updated to Ver. 1.3.0 on Thursday, March 5, 2026 after maintenance.

(Schedule is subject to change.)

An underground metropolis built around a huge underground cavern and crash-landed spaceship, featuring resort facilities with various events

Underworld Geo is one of Holoearth’s premier entertainment cities, featuring a theater for enjoying immersive concert performances as well as the Poker Room.

Be sure to explore this lively city, where you can also enjoy dazzling fireworks and beautiful fountain shows.

New Characters: Nanaka and The Five Succubus Sisters

New characters will be added to the world of Holoearth as introduced here, so check them out!

Area: Focal Square A pathfinder from Realearth.

She is a creative with great interest in the excitement of Holoearth.

(CV: Maaya Uchida)

: Underworld Geo, Poker Room The five sisters are: the eldest, Rati; the second, Riti; the third, Ruti; the fourth, Reti; and the youngest, Roti.

They are employed by Jabberwock, a prominent figure in Underworld Geo, and work at the resort as staff members.

During performances, a new “Live Camera” feature will be added, allowing participants to enjoy visuals that sync with the stage production.

In the venue, press V to switch between the normal view, “Manual Camera,” and the performance view, “Automatic Camera.”

With“Automatic Camera,” watch the stage through camera work that matches the performers’ actions and stage effects.

Choose your preferred perspective and enjoy the show from the best angle possible!

While using this new mode, Photo Mode will still be accessible with the P key, however, some features may not work properly.

Improvement to Menu Usability

The Change Area, Shop, Change Outfit, and HoloPhone icons will now always be displayed on-screen. By pressing the corresponding shortcut keys, users will be able to instantly access each feature.

Underworld Geo’s own new brand, UG.FROLIC, will arrive. Other new items will also be available at the fashion shop ALTERMODE, so please look forward to them.

・UG.FROLIC Elegant Dress (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Jacket & Blouse (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Bodysuit

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Jacket

・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Underwear

・UG.FROLIC Lace Underwear (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・ALTERMODE Piped Underwear ・UG.FROLIC Balloon Shorts (Wine / YelGn / Grp)

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shorts

・UG.FROLIC Bat & Card Tights

・UG.FROLIC Suspender Socks (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Bat Motif Heels

・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Heels (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・UG.FROLIC Leg Warmer Shoes (Wine / Vlt / BtlGn)

・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Shoes

・UG.FROLIC Veil Hat (Gn / YelGn / Grp)

・UG.FROLIC Wings Accessory

・UG.FROLIC Diamond Monocle (Bg / Gry / DkGry) ・UG.FROLIC Glamorous Heart ・ALTERMODE Cosmic Motif Earrings ・UG.FROLIC Half-Palm Gloves (Blk / Vlt / DkGry) ・Underworld Geo Horns ・UG.FROLIC Wrist Cuffs

After maintenance a new clapping gesture will be added.

March 5, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance.

New Customization Options

New avatar customization options will be added after maintenance.

March 5, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance.

・Over-Eye Asymmetrical Bangs

・Active Asymmetrical Bangs

・Natural Long Side Bangs ・Half Side Tail ・Dual Color Feather ・Cross Scar

New idle motions will be added, which can be changed in the avatar “Change Outfit” menu.

In certain areas such as Focal Square users will now be able to activate the HoloPhone while moving.

Photo Mode Feature Update While Photo Mode is active, users will be able to take pictures using the left mouse button or the Space bar.

In certain areas such as Focal Square chat messages will now be displayed across the entire area.

Area Selection in Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop An area selection feature has been added to the Simulation Room, My Room, and My Shop.

Salon & Clinic Focal Square Branch

A Salon & Clinic branch will be added to Focal Square, allowing for greater ease of customizing user avatars.

Avatar Customization Feature Update Avatars will now be customizable without needing Alt Beautys Points or Rebuild Cores, and the sale of Rebuild Cores will be discontinued.

items.author: narita

Store Name: hololive production official shop in Harajuku Store Location: Tokyu Plaza Omotesando “OMOKADO”, 4-30-3 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo

Opening Date: April 24, 2026

Business Hours: 11:00 – 20:00

Due to an anticipated higher volume of customers during the first two days upon opening (April 24 – April 25, 2026), entry will be restricted via advance reservation using “LivePocket-Ticket-”. Please check this page for further details.

Official hololive production merchandise, including store-specific merchandise, will be available for purchase! ・ OFFICIAL SHOP exclusive original merchandise

・ Selected merchandise from hololive production OFFICIAL SHOP*

・ Selected hololive production licensed merchandise* Does not include talent anniversary merchandise items and other made-to-order products. * There may be purchase limitations depending on the sales status.

* Please note that the items are in limited quantities and will not be available once they are sold out.

* We cannot answer any inquiries regarding our inventory, including when the items will be stocked.

* Products may be rereleased at future dates after the initial event period has ended.

* The actual product may differ from the product sample image.

■ Talents of Harajuku Store Official Merchandise Usada Pekora / La+ Darknesss / Kobo Kanaeru / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Isaki Riona / Koganei Niko / Mizumiya Su / Rindo Chihaya / Kikirara Vivi

Also debuting is ‘Harajuku Chibi Style,’ featuring a design concept rooted in the signature palette and confectionery culture of Harajuku.

2. 7,700 Yen or More (Tax Included) Original Vinyl Shopping Bag (1 Design)

Additional items are planned for customers using the official holoplus app. (Proof required.)

The following special in-store experiences will be available.

1. Life-Size hololive Figure Display (Limited Time Event) A life-size figure of Usada Pekora will be on display for a limited time.

View this intricately crafted masterpiece in all of its glory!

Display Period: April 24, 2026 – May 31, 2026

2. Spatial Reality Display Sony’s Spatial Reality Display technology allows for clear and vivid stereoscopic viewing – no 3D glasses required!

Unique video content will be shown exclusively at the Harajuku store location.

* Viewing availability will be limited to a select number of customers per day.

■ Talents of Spatial Reality Display Usada Pekora / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Kikirara Vivi

3. Special In-Store Broadcast & Autograph Display Newly recorded voice messages from participating hololive members will be broadcast, in addition to replica autographs and messages on display.

items.title: New Shop Opening in Harajuku, the Hub of Trends! “hololive production official shop in Harajuku” Will Launch on April 24, 2026!
items.author: narita
items.content:
Featuring exclusive content, such as Spatial Reality Displays, life-size figure, and much, much more!

COVER Corp. (Headquarters: Minato-ku, Tokyo; President: Motoaki Tanigawa) will open “hololive production official shop in Harajuku” at OMOKADO on April 24, 2026. This store will be operated in cooperation with KIDDY LAND Co.,Ltd. (Headquarters: Chiyoda, Tokyo; CEO: Takahiko Tsumura).

This official hololive production store will premiere in Harajuku, a global hub for culture. In addition to selling original new merchandise featuring newly drawn visuals,.this store will also offer special experiential content unique to the Harajuku location.

An eye-catching life-size figure will be on display for a limited time! In addition, custom video content will be shown using a state-of-the-art “Spatial Reality Display”, allowing viewers to enjoy impressive 3D visuals without the need for 3D glasses.

The store will deliver a must-see experience that seamlessly blends technology and entertainment.

A total of 10 talents will appear in newly created illustrations wearing colorful, pop-inspired Harajuku outfits.

Visitors are invited to experience the many features of the hololive production official shop in Harajuku.

Due to an anticipated higher volume of customers during the first two days upon opening (April 24 – April 25, 2026), entry will be restricted via advance reservation using “LivePocket-Ticket-”.

Please check the official website for further details.

Official hololive production merchandise, including store-specific merchandise, will be available for purchase.

* Purchase restrictions may be imposed based on product availability. * Available while supplies last. Product availability may vary.

* Individual inquiries related to product availability (e.g. quantities; resupplying; etc.) will not be accepted.

* Products may be rereleased at future dates after the initial event period has ended.

* Images are for illustrative purposes only. Actual products may differ.

* Prices and full product lineup will be announced at a later date.

items.title: hololive SUPER EXPO 2026 Holoearth Booth Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Thank you for your support of Holoearth.

Holoearth will be exhibiting a booth at “hololive SUPER EXPO 2026,” one of the largest offline events hosted by hololive production, to be held at Makuhari Messe from March 6 to 8, 2026.

At the Holoearth booth, we plan to screen special footage from past events such as the “Arrival Festivals” and “NePoLaBo Live,” featuring hololive production talents.

There will also be displays where visitors experience Holoearth’s journey so far in a real-world setting, including life-size panels of talents from past Arrival Festival events.

We hope you enjoy the world of Holoearth at hololive SUPER EXPO 2026!

items.title: Octopus x hololive 3rd Generation Physical Card Collection is Now Available for Pre-Order!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
February 27, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce the renewed collaboration between hololive production and Octopus Card, unveiling a special series of physical Octopus card sets featuring the talents of hololive 3rd Generation.

Octopus Card Collection Details

The hololive 3rd Generation Octopus Card collection comes in two versions: a Single Card Set and a Collector’s Set, tailored for both practical users and passionate collectors.

Dressed in autumn‑winter school uniforms, the four members are ready to accompany you across Hong Kong—ride the MTR, board double‑decker buses, tour on trams, and sail the harbour—making them part of your daily commute and city exploration!

Set Includes: ・ hololive 3rd Generation Physical Octopus Card

・ Octopus Card Holder with Lanyard

Set Includes: ・ hololive 3rd Generation Physical Octopus Card

・ Octopus Slide-on Card Holder

・ Card Display Stand

・ Acrylic Shikishi Artboard

・ Gift Box Packaging

Pre‑order your exclusive Octopus Card today and let hololive 3rd Generation members join you as you journey through Hong Kong!

Octopus is a contactless stored value card that provides customers with a simple, safe, and secure way to pay. First launched in 1997 across public transport systems, the applications of the Octopus card have since expanded to include retail stores and various facilities, making everyday life more convenient.

items.title: Hoshimachi Suisei Live “SuperNova: REBOOT” のオフィシャル…
FLOW GLOW × タワレコカフェ 3月12日よりコラボ開催!
items.content: hololive DEV_ISからデビューした5人組のガールズグループ『FLOW GLOW』× タワーレコードカフェにて2026年3月21日〜4月6日までコラボカフェが開催。響咲リオナ・虎金妃笑虎・水宮枢・輪堂千速・綺々羅々ヴィヴィをイメージしたコラボメニュー、コラボカフェ限定グッズが登場!
